title: helichrysum dilucidum
intro: Helichrysum dilucidum, also known as yellow cushion bush, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum dilucidum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
